options.content:
- Identify and eliminate labels with frequently changed values to reduce their [cardinality](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/#what-is-high-cardinality) and [high churn rate](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/#what-is-high-churn-rate)
- Find unused time series and [drop entire metrics](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/relabeling/)
- Aggregate time series before they got ingested into the database via [streaming aggregation](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/stream-aggregation/)

panels.title: Metrics with a high number of series

options.content:
- Decrease the number of unique label values to reduce cardinality
- Drop the label entirely via [relabeling](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/relabeling/)
- For volatile label values (such as URL path, user session, etc.) consider printing them to the log file instead of adding to time series
